goal: Align battle runtime with v2.0 rule intent: remove hidden-card semantics and reduce active battle card categories to two core types (立论/策术) while preserving playable combat value.
constraints: Follow docs/battle/battle-design-核心规则-v2.0.md as primary rule reference for this adjustment.
Do not introduce extra card categories beyond 立论/策术 in battleV2 runtime.
Do not keep hidden/secret reveal semantics in active player interaction text or planned card presentation.
Keep changes scoped to battle runtime and directly related battle UI wording/presentation.
deliverables: Conflict arbitration record documenting why previous 5-type + hidden-layer implementation is replaced.
battleV2 type and card data reduced to 立论/策术 runtime model.
engine planning/resolve no longer expresses hidden-card semantics.
BattleFrameV2-related hint and slot labels no longer describe 明牌/暗牌 hidden play.
